commit.message:
"AM" 10 (#2204)

* Allow update of the same app on two permission levels

fix https://github.com/ivan-hc/AM/issues/2191

* Fix GH_APPS detection

* Option -u, add spaces to symbols (header) and show doubled items

* Fix duplicated updates for apps installed on more permission levels

* Update APP-MANAGER

* Add "(AppMan)" to local apps during AM updates

* Fix missing version for local apps during AM update

* Fix -a and -l for apps installed on multiple permission levels

* Add function to determine $argpath where needed

* Update management.am

* Fix $argpath detection in immutable distros

* Update argpath detection in builtin options

* Update $argpath detection

* Simplify functions to remove the apps

* Fix remove permissions on argpath

* Fix bad selection for same app installed on multiple permission levels

* Allow sandboxing of appimages installed on both permission levels

* Fix sandboxing of apps "locked" with the option "lock"

* Fix "reinstall --all" for apps installed on more permission levels

* "clone -i": allow installing the same app for more permission levels

* Filter suspicious "argpath" paths, i.e. with less content than normal

* Move Ubuntu mess and dependences check out from functions

* Check integrity of the arguments and orphaned directories

* Undo previous commit

* Improve function to detect orphaned directories

* Detect and remove orphaned directories

* Update template.am, add warning when selecting latest release

* Option -t, if $arg is a github URL, skip the step that asks for it

* Option -t, download apps list from "main", also in developer mode

* Option -i, find and remove orphaned directories in AppMan mode

* Detect directories with less than 4 elements and accept libraries

* Update sandboxes.am

* Option -f, libraries come from the AM database

* Show message when a ghost directory has been removed

* Update APP-MANAGER

* Fix "unhide" option

* Related to https://github.com/ivan-hc/AM/pull/2204/commits/0499375ad2ba9032d77eb0de6e3507f8505bfd8c

* Related to https://github.com/ivan-hc/AM/pull/2204/commits/0499375ad2ba9032d77eb0de6e3507f8505bfd8c

* Set trap to cleanup on interruption, by @fiftydinar

* Option -i, clone original "remove" script

* Add "trap" function

* Replace _remove_info_files with _clean_amcachedir

* Option -o, save core scripts from the target app

* Add separator to remover options

* Option --launcher, extract to temporary dir and support Anylinux packages

* Update APP-MANAGER

verification.payload:
tree a5ba70743f995f68072ae80c91ff6fc68b2902f4
parent 83cf1a3b1cf709f0cf16b12eafd3c880f034e6ba
